name: Culture Amp
tagline: Employee experience platform with AI-powered people analytics
description: Culture Amp is the leading employee experience platform that combines engagement surveys, performance management, and people analytics with AI-powered insights. Its machine learning models predict employee turnover risk, identify key engagement drivers, and generate actionable recommendations. Culture Amp's benchmarking data from thousands of companies provides context for your workforce metrics.
cons: Performance features less mature than dedicated tools
Can be pricey for smaller orgs
